name: stage1-typed-rvv-elementwise-intrinsic-derivation
title: Stage1 typed RVV elementwise intrinsic derivation
description: Bounded Stage 1 replacement for RVV elementwise route-family planning so add/sub/mul and connected splat/memory/mask leaves derive intrinsic/type outputs from typed tcrv_rvv body/config facts instead of legacy i32m route authority.
creator: codex
